\tzpentry{ID4292}{Wavefunction Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4292 introduces Wavefunction Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\hat{\mathbf{p}}_1=\cos\psi\hat{\mathbf{e}}_1+\sin\psi\hat{\mathbf{e}}_2, \quad \hat{\mathbf{p}}_2=-\sin\psi\hat{\mathbf{e}}_1+\cos\psi\hat{\mathbf{e}}_2$
\]
